CustomField.label: External Id
CustomField.description: External system key reserved for a future CoWIN/U-WIN integration seam (OQ-016); not populated in F-001. Marked External ID + Unique per design §2.3; no composite default-value formula is set for this field in this ticket since VS-01's acceptance criteria only require the composite key behavior on VS_Facility_Service__c (see review packet).
